ast.name: info
ast.source: LogTape loggers are configured.  Note that LogTape itself uses the meta logger, which has category {metaLoggerCategory}.  The meta logger is used to log internal diagnostics such as sink exceptions.  It's recommended to configure the meta logger with a separate sink so that you can easily notice if logging itself fails or is misconfigured.  To turn off this message, configure the meta logger with higher log levels than {dismissLevel}.  See also <https://logtape.org/manual/categories#meta-logger>.
ast.target: LogTape 日志记录器已配置。请注意，LogTape 本身使用元日志记录器，其类别为 {metaLoggerCategory}。元日志记录器用于记录内部诊断信息，例如接收器异常。建议为元日志记录器配置单独的接收器，以便在日志记录本身失败或配置错误时能够轻松察觉。要关闭此消息，请将元日志记录器的日志级别设置为高于 {dismissLevel}。请参阅 <https://logtape.org/manual/categories#meta-logger>。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: editor:open-search command not found, cannot patch obsidian search command
ast.target: 未找到editor:open-search命令，无法修补obsidian搜索命令

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 连接超时，正在重新连接...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Realtime send() is automatically falling back to REST API. This behavior will be deprecated in the future. Please use httpSend() explicitly for REST delivery.
ast.target: Realtime send()自动回退到REST API。此行为将在未来弃用。请显式使用httpSend()进行REST传输。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: WebCrypto API is not supported. Code challenge method will default to use plain instead of sha256.
ast.target: 不支持WebCrypto API。代码质询方法将默认使用plain而非sha256。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Using the user object as returned from supabase.auth.getSession() or from some supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange() events could be insecure! This value comes directly from the storage medium (usually cookies on the server) and may not be authentic. Use supabase.auth.getUser() instead which authenticates the data by contacting the Supabase Auth server.
ast.target: 使用从 supabase.auth.getSession() 或某些 supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange() 事件返回的用户对象可能不安全！该值直接来自存储介质（通常是服务器上的 cookie），可能不真实。请改用 supabase.auth.getUser()，该方法通过联系 Supabase Auth 服务器来验证数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Error when querying Navigator LockManager state
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 查询 Navigator LockManager 状态时出错

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager returned a null lock when using #request without ifAvailable set to true, it appears this browser is not following the LockManager spec https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/LockManager/request
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager 在使用 #request 且未将 ifAvailable 设置为 true 时返回了空锁，看起来此浏览器未遵循 LockManager 规范 https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/LockManager/request

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager returned null lock even with steal: true
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager 即使设置了 steal: true 仍返回空锁

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued over 120s ago, URL could be stale
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 检索到的会话是在 120 秒前发出的，URL 可能已过期

ast.name: warn
ast.source: @supabase/gotrue-js: Session as retrieved from URL was issued in the future? Check the device clock for skew
ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: 从 URL 检索到的会话是在未来发出的？请检查设备时钟是否偏差

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to set initial Realtime auth token:
ast.target: 设置初始 Realtime 认证令牌失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: ⚠️  Node.js 18 and below are deprecated and will no longer be supported in future versions of @supabase/supabase-js. Please upgrade to Node.js 20 or later. For more information, visit: https://github.com/orgs/supabase/discussions/37217
ast.target: ⚠️ Node.js 18 及以下版本已弃用，未来版本的 @supabase/supabase-js 将不再支持。请升级到 Node.js 20 或更高版本。更多信息请访问：https://github.com/orgs/supabase/discussions/37217

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unsupported edit list entry: media rate must be 1.
ast.target: 不支持的编辑列表条目：媒体速率必须为1。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 无效的dec3盒子内容，已忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Can't have two trun boxes for the same track in one fragment. Ignoring...
ast.target: 同一片段中不能有两个trun盒子对应同一轨道。已忽略...

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Request will not be retried because a CORS error was suspected due to different origins. You can modify this behavior by providing your own function for the 'getRetryDelay' option.
ast.target: 由于检测到不同来源可能导致的CORS错误，请求将不会重试。您可以通过提供自定义的'getRetryDelay'选项函数来修改此行为。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: HTTP server did not respond with 206 Partial Content, meaning the entire remote resource now has to be downloaded. For efficient media file streaming across a network, please make sure your server supports range requests.
ast.target: HTTP服务器未响应206部分内容，这意味着现在必须下载整个远程资源。为了实现高效的网络媒体文件流式传输，请确保您的服务器支持范围请求。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 构建 Content-Range 标头失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No valid media items found in drop
ast.target: 拖放中未找到有效的媒体项

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Note not found for boolean toggle

ast.name: warn

ast.name: warn

ast.name: error

ast.name: error
ast.source: Unknown JavaScript runtime without WebSocket support.
ast.target: 检测到不支持 WebSocket 的未知 JavaScript 运行时。

ast.name: message

ast.target: 宽高比必须采用<宽度>/<高度>的格式

ast.name: message
ast.source: Aspect ratio x or y must be a number
ast.target: 宽高比 x 或 y 必须为数字

ast.name: message
ast.source: Aspect ratio cannot be reduced to lowest terms

ast.source: [vidstack] `hls.js` is not supported in this environment

ast.name: message
ast.source: [vidstack] `dash.js` is not supported in this environment

ast.name: message
ast.source: JSON object requested, multiple (or no) rows returned

ast.name: message
ast.source: Registration ceremony was sent an abort signal
ast.target: 注册仪式收到了中止信号

ast.name: message
ast.source: Discoverable credentials were required but no available authenticator supported it
ast.target: 需要可发现的凭据，但可用的验证器均不支持

ast.name: message

ast.name: message
ast.source: User verification was required but no available authenticator supported it

ast.name: message
ast.source: No entry in pubKeyCredParams was of type "public-key"

ast.name: message
ast.source: No available authenticator supported any of the specified pubKeyCredParams algorithms
ast.target: 没有可用的验证器支持指定的任何 pubKeyCredParams 算法

ast.name: message
ast.source: User ID was not between 1 and 64 characters

ast.name: message
